rules.name: Manifest Validity
rules.description: manifest.json must exist, be valid JSON, and use Manifest V3.

rules.name: Changelog Entry
rules.description: CHANGELOG.md must contain a release entry matching the current manifest version.

rules.name: Privacy Policy Presence
rules.description: PRIVACY.md must exist in the repository root and contain no placeholders.

rules.name: Store Metadata Completeness
rules.description: CHROMEWEBSTORE.md must exist, be fully populated, and contain no [REQUIRED] or [RECOMMENDED] placeholders.

rules.name: Store Listing Graphic Assets
rules.description: All icons and screenshots referenced in CHROMEWEBSTORE.md and manifest.json must exist on disk.
